productDisplayName: Nike Men's Air Googly 2 White Shoe
description: Get the feel of being airborne in these super light shoes. The feel of air cushion below your feet gives hat extra bounce required to win your match against the arch enemies!Upper Synthetic leather upper with mesh for lightweight durability Full mesh tongue with mesh padded collar for snug Fit Perforated upper for breathability Gilly central lacing for customised fit nike Air chamber on the heel cup Pull loop  at the back of the collar to attach it with rucksack Midsole Removable sockliner that can be replaced with a medical orthotic Soft, cushioned footbed for all day step-in comfort Full length phylon midsole for light weight comfort Midsole made with nike Air technology for maximum air traction Outsole Durable carbon rubber outsole with conical lugs for grip on all surfaces Vertical flex groove for ultimate traction Protruding teeth-like structures on the periphery of the outsole for great grip shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
